subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: Set up a new website in the current folder

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Generate and run a localhost server on default port 8000 for the website in the current folder

subcommands.name: deploy
subcommands.description: Generate and deploy the website in the current folder

subcommands.name: generate
subcommands.description: Generate the website in the current folder
